creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Norbert Grundmann from comment #38)
Do we need 0 byte files:
java/eclipse/files/addons/rt.equinox.binaries/org.eclipse.equinox.executable/bin/gtk/freebsd/aarch64/eclipse
java/eclipse/files/addons/rt.equinox.binaries/org.eclipse.equinox.executable/bin/gtk/freebsd/powerpc64/eclipse
java/eclipse/files/addons/rt.equinox.binaries/org.eclipse.equinox.executable/bin/gtk/freebsd/powerpc64le/eclipse
java/eclipse/files/addons/rt.equinox.binaries/org.eclipse.equinox.executable/bin/gtk/freebsd/x86_64/eclipse
?

If we want to save empty directories in git, then we have another mechanism for this.

Also, many files are missing the end-of-line character on the last line.
